name: @ont/claim-path
description: ONT B3 integration — the batched-claim enforcement orchestrator (I-HARNESS). Pure + fixture-backed: threads the audited @ont/consensus + @ont/evidence predicates/builders, fails closed in a fixed precedence, and returns an evidence trace + verdict (never a bare mutation). B4 substitutes real adapters for the typed seams.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && vitest run
